subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。両手の薬指を小指の輪に上から入れてにぎります。両手の小指も上から入れ直して糸をにぎります
subtitle.en: Begin from Opening A. Move both ring fingers over and pick down into the little-finger loops and hold them. Then move both little fingers over and pick down again, holding the strings.

subtitle.ja: 親指の輪に、左右の薬指と小指を下から入れて糸をにぎります。親指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Pick up from below into the thumb loops with both ring fingers and little fingers, and hold the strings. Remove the thumb loops.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指手前側の糸を押し下げ、薬指手前の2本の糸を取って引き出します
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, press down the near index-finger strings, then take the two near ring-finger strings and pull them out.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Remove the index-finger loops from both hands.

subtitle.ja: 右親指手前側から左手のひらへ斜めに渡る2本の糸を左右の人差し指と中指でそれぞれ挟み、向こうへ回しながら人差し指にかけます
subtitle.en: With both index fingers and middle fingers, pinch the two strings running diagonally from the near side of the right thumb to the left palm, carry them around to the far side, and place them onto the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の糸を全て外します
subtitle.en: Remove all strings from both thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左人差し指の輪に左親指を下から入れ、左人差し指向こう側の2本の糸を上から取ります
subtitle.en: Insert the left thumb from below into the loop on the left index finger, then move over and pick down the two far strings on the left index finger.

subtitle.ja: 左親指の2本の輪に右親指を下から入れて広げます
subtitle.en: Insert the right thumb from below into the two loops on the left thumb and open them.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の輪に親指を下から入れて広げます
subtitle.en: Insert the thumbs from below into the index-finger loops on both hands and open them.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指にかかる上の2本の糸を残したまま、下の2本の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: Leaving the upper two strings on both thumbs in place, remove only the lower two strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の糸を全て外します
subtitle.en: Remove all strings from both index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 中央の三角の輪に左人差し指を上から入れ、小指向こう側の2本の糸を引っかけて引き出し、左親指の輪に上から入れます
subtitle.en: Move the left index finger over and pick down into the central triangular loop, hook the two far little-finger strings and pull them out, then insert from above into the loop on the left thumb.

subtitle.ja: 右薬指と小指の糸を全て外します
subtitle.en: Remove all strings from the right ring finger and little finger.

subtitle.ja: 左人差し指と右小指の指先を合わせて輪を移します。形を整えて完成です
subtitle.en: Touch the tips of the left index finger and the right little finger together to transfer the loop. Adjust the figure to finish.
